name: 5' x 3.5' LED Vine Curtain String Lights Warm White - West & Arrow: Indoor PVC Ivy Fairy Lights, Battery Operated
description: Glow your garden or light up your room with the West & Arrow LED Curtain Vine Lights. Featuring 6 strands, 66 warm white LED lights and 300 faux leaves, these LED lights are USB or battery powered, require no assembly and are sure to add warmth and elegance to your space. Use the included remote control to activate the 8 lights modes including combination, in wave, sequential, slow glow, chasing, slow fade, twinkle and steady on.
